calendar.matters:
Petition For Order Confirming Trust Property
Off Calendar Jan-03-2017 Denied
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Paul Weiss and Jane Donahue for petitioner Sanford Goldstein.

The Court observed that petitioners had created their own problem by obtaining an order for distribution from the Marin Court after the death of decedent Betty Rabin, without informing that court of her demise. Ms. Donahue responded that the petition before the Marin Court had been filed while Ms. Rabin was living, and that she believes the testamentary intent for transfer of after-acquired property into the trust would lead to the transfer of the distribution into the trust. The Court noted that the distribution order had provided for the distribution to Ms. Rabin in her individual capacity and not as trustee, and that he was not aware of any governing authority which held that a general provision for transfer of after-acquired property would be effective to effect the transfer into the Rabin Trust. The matter was taken under submission.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Craig Blackstone. Bailiff: Deputy Rosado. (Not reported)
